top_signals.title: Micron soars 16% after blockbuster earnings, lifting some chip stocks
top_signals.summary: The company's revenue more than quadrupled from $9.3 billion a year earlier to $41.46 billion, it reported on Wednesday

top_signals.title: Sophon sunsets its Layer 2 blockchain, moves to Base to build consumer apps
top_signals.summary: Sophon, which has raised $70 million in total funding, is shutting down its Layer 2 blockchain and moving to Base to build consumer apps.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
